assumption: Stakeholder outcome weights sum to one within each group
Scenario performance values are normalized from zero to one
Disagreement is represented as score dispersion across stakeholder groups
risk_if_wrong: Important qualitative disagreement may be hidden
The process may overvalue consensus or undervalue principled disagreement

assumption: All relevant stakeholder groups are represented in the scoring table
risk_if_wrong: Missing groups may invalidate the participatory claim

assumption: Scenario definitions are understandable to nontechnical participants
risk_if_wrong: Participants may not be able to meaningfully evaluate model outputs

assumption: Workshop evidence can be linked to model structure without losing context
risk_if_wrong: Local knowledge may be oversimplified or extracted
